# `state.bool`

> **Stability:** stable
> **Since:** 0.4

Allocate or read a persistent boolean slot.

## Signature

```ts
bool(_init: boolean): MutableSlot<boolean> {
    return sentinel("state.bool");
}
```

## Example

```ts
const fn: typeof state.bool = state.bool;
    void fn;
```
